sql_query.query: INSERT INTO circles (id, name, description, creator_id, contribution_amount, currency, frequency, seats, current_cycle, pot_balance, status, invite_code, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5::float8, $6, $7, $8::int, 1, 0, 'forming', $9, $10::timestamptz, $11::timestamptz) RETURNING id, name, description, contribution_amount, currency, frequency, seats, invite_code, pot_balance, current_cycle, status
INSERT INTO memberships (id, circle_id, user_id, payout_position, has_been_paid, role, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, 1, false, 'admin', $4::timestamptz, $5::timestamptz)
INSERT INTO activities (id, circle_id, user_id, actor_name, type, message, created_at) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, 'circle_created', $5, $6::timestamptz)
